Multi-Sig:                 ⚠️  NOT YET CONFIGURED


🛠️ WITHDRAWAL COMMANDS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Check balance:
  node scripts/withdraw-sol.js balance

Create withdrawal (unsigned):
  node scripts/withdraw-sol.js withdraw 100

Execute withdrawal (with private key):
  node scripts/withdraw-sol.js execute 100 ~/.secrets/deployer.key

View withdrawal history:
  node scripts/withdraw-sol.js history

Show help:
  node scripts/withdraw-sol.js help


🔐 SECURITY LEVELS (Recommended)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
< 1,000 SOL        →  Single signature (Authority)
1,000 - 10,000     →  2-of-3 multi-sig
> 10,000 SOL       →  3-of-5 multi-sig + 24h timelock
